name: Alex Skills OS
platform: Alibaba Cloud / Qwen Chat / DashScope API
setup_instructions: 1. Go to chat.qwenlm.ai OR Alibaba Cloud DashScope console
2. Paste all of qwen/system-prompt.md as the system prompt
3. Use qwen2.5-72b-instruct for best results; qwen-max for highest quality
4. For API: set system role message with the full system prompt content
5. Test: 'Break down the [niche] market and rank the top 3 opportunities'

messages.content: Break down the B2B SaaS market for me
